project_type: Node.js distributed task queue engine - monorepo with shared/, server/, worker/ workspaces
build_system: npm workspaces, tsc for each workspace. Build order: shared -> server -> worker
test_framework: Vitest with ioredis-mock for Redis mocking and vi.fn() mock pg Pool. Tests in tests/ directory at root.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compiles. 2. Run npm test to confirm all tests pass (61 existing + new phase5 tests). 3. Verify dashboard builds with npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/dashboard.
setup_instructions: npm install at root installs all workspace dependencies. No Docker needed for tests (uses ioredis-mock).
environment_constraints: Node.js 22.22.3 available. npm 11.4.2. No Docker daemon for runtime testing but npm install works. Network available for package installs.
contribution_requirements: ESM modules with 'type': 'module'. Strict TypeScript with NodeNext resolution. All .js extensions in imports. Tests use ioredis-mock + mock pg Pool pattern.
key_patterns: Redis keys centralized in shared/src/keys.ts (redisKeys object). DB operations as thin functions in shared/src/db.ts. Routes built via buildRouter() factory accepting deps. Worker uses rpoplpush/BLMOVE for at-least-once delivery. Producer writes Postgres first, then Redis. Tests mock pg.Pool with vi.fn() capturing queries.
directory_structure: Root: package.json (workspaces), tsconfig.base.json, vitest.config.ts. shared/: types, redis keys, db helpers. server/: Express HTTP server + Producer SDK. worker/: Worker pull loop, scheduler, janitor, rate-limiter. tests/: phase1-4 test files. infra/postgres/: SQL migrations.
